emotional_tone: Authority, Clarity, Trust, and Operational Efficiency

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Functional density for dashboards, generous breathing room for settings/profiles.
spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID (Dense, data-heavy)
spacing_and_layout.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-slate-200), no drop shadows by default. Hover adds subtle -translate-y-[2px] and shadow-sm.

components.buttons: Square or rounded-md (max 6px). Primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#00227A]. Secondary: bg-white border border-slate-300 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50. Ghost: text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-100.
components.inputs: Shadcn default styling (h-10), focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7]/20 focus:border-[#002FA7].
components.tables: Dense rows, sticky header. Zebra striping on hover (hover:bg-slate-50). Data aligned strictly (left for text, right for numbers/currency).
components.sidebar: Collapsible sidebar, 250px wide. Active link indicated by left border accent (border-l-4 border-[#002FA7]) and subtle background tint (bg-blue-50/50 text-[#002FA7]).
components.badges: Flat colors for status. Active/Clocked-in: bg-green-100 text-green-800. Pending/Leave: bg-amber-100 text-amber-800. Inactive: bg-slate-100 text-slate-800.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and fast (0.15s ease-out). Changes to background colors and border shades.
motion_and_interactions.modals: Backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-sm bg-slate-900/40), dialog slides up from center.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react (Clean, line-based, size 18px for body context, 24px for sidebar).

employee_avatar_1.description: Diverse professional portrait for dummy employee profiles
employee_avatar_1.usage: Use as placeholder for employee avatars in tables and profile pages.

employee_avatar_2.description: Professional women portrait for employee list
employee_avatar_2.usage: Use as alternative avatar for team directory.

tenant_logo_1.usage: Use as dummy company/tenant logo in the top-left of the sidebar.

auth_hero.usage: Use as the background or hero image for the SaaS Auth / Login split screen.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_ids: CRITICAL: MUST apply data-testid to every button, form input, navigation link, and table row for robust E2E testing.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA contrast ratios, especially when placing text over tinted backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Light Theme with the defined High-Contrast Color Palette. Do not use gradients.
Build the dashboard using a Grid layout (MODE B) - optimize for density, use standard Shadcn UI elements but apply the 'flat and bordered' container aesthetic.
For Attendance and Payroll tables, make sure column headers are sticky and data relies on typography hierarchy rather than bulky cards.
Implement the Kanban board for Recruitment with a crisp, non-skeuomorphic UI (flat cards, 1px borders).
Replace Shadcn's default Inter font with Chivo (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body). Include these from Google Fonts in your layout file.
Do not use transparent header backgrounds. Use solid bg-white with a hard border-b.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='clock-in-button').
